app.title: Bodybuilding Transformation
app.subtitle: Jeff Nippard · 12-Week Tracker
overview.how1: Navigate to any week using the tabs above. Select the workout day to view that session's exercises.
overview.how2: For each set, enter the weight you used and the reps completed. Data saves automatically to your account.
overview.how3: Exercise names are clickable links (where provided) so you can watch demo videos before each workout.
overview.how4: Weeks 1–5 = Foundation Block. Weeks 6–12 = Ramping Block. The program structure changes between blocks.
overview.how5: Sign in on any device with the same username to keep your progress in sync.
week.title: Week {n}
day.label: Day {n}
rest.title: Rest Day
rest.body: Recovery is part of the program. Sleep, eat, and come back stronger.
confirm.reset: Clear all tracked data? This cannot be undone.
confirm.import: Import progress saved in this browser from the old tracker?
auth.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
auth.usernameTooLong: Username must be 24 characters or less.
auth.usernameInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
